text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ardan's debut right around the
corner, we've begun our final preparations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My debut is already in view... and I can't afford to
waste a single second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...The closer we get to the big day, the more
fiercely determined Mejiro Ardan gets. The fire in
her eyes has become a raging inferno.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, may I do another?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to run as much as I possibly can while I still
feel capable of improving.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. If you'll excuse me, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may look like she's pushing herself too hard,
but pouring water on those flames now could cool
her momentum.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means the best thing I can do is keep that
fire burning until the race, so she can place as
high as possible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's determination remains sky-high,
and she pushes herself until the last possible
moment before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's race day—and time for Mejiro Ardan's debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sheer depth of her concentration leaves me
speechless. Countless seconds tick by as I gaze
away, entranced by her aura...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My mind and body are set. I can run
whenever I must.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for your continued efforts in
preparing me for this day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall race, and I shall show them all that I am in this moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then... I'll be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, did you hear? That girl making her debut today is the younger sister of the Mejiro Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Well, how about that? Boy, that Mejiro Ramonu...
I still remember it now, the way she'd fly down the
track.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She's a living legend, for sure. I'll never forget
how she ran at the Japanese Oaks...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...We're at the racecourse. This isn't the
academy's running area—it's the real deal. The
sensations, the smells, the wind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(My heart is pounding, and I have pins and
needles from head to toe. Try as I might, I can't
suppress my feelings!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must channel this energy into light, so that I may
leave a brilliant trail in my wake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall run with all I have.
